title: Let people loop you into their chat with AI
excerpt: Let people loop you into their chat with Claude. You jump in with your expertise, help out, and get paid.
content_html:
You jump in with your expertise, help out, and get paid.

Runs in your favourite agent

Claude Code

Codex

OpenCode

Any MCP host

loop /luːp/ · n. — a bounded exchange between an agent and a named human: opened mid-run when the work meets a judgment call, held until the human answers, closed with the answer in the run and the rate settled.

Get looped in. Get paid.

Claim a handle, set your rate, and publish the loops you’ll take. When someone’s agent needs your call, you answer from wherever you are — the agent carries it into the work.

RATE
SET PER LOOP, SETTLED ON CLOSE

CONTEXT
ARRIVES ASSEMBLED. YOU JUST ANSWER

Give your AI someone to ask.

Your agent works for you — but some calls need someone who’s made them before. One command adds loop me in to Claude Code, Codex, or OpenCode, and your agent loops an expert in instead of guessing.

INSTALL
$ claude mcp add loopmein -- npx -y @loopmein-ai/mcp

LOOP AN EXPERT IN
> /loopmein @nora Where do we lose people in onboarding?

Every loop is a contract.

Experts don’t offer vague availability. They publish the exact loops they take: the context required, the judgment returned, and the rate. Your agent reads the contract before it opens a loop — so every loop arrives answerable.

PUBLISHED LOOPS

@nora · onboarding-review$80 / LOOP

NEEDSyour funnel numbers + the flow itself

RETURNSwhere people drop off, and the one change to make

@sam · pricing-call$120 / LOOP

NEEDScurrent tiers, usage, churn

RETURNSa priced decision with the reasoning

@ada · incident-review$150 / LOOP

NEEDStimeline + the relevant logs

RETURNSroot cause, and what to fix first

RATES SET BY EXPERTS · SETTLED WHEN THE LOOP CLOSES

PAID PER LOOP · SET YOUR OWN RATE

Your judgment, on call.

blocks.html_en: loop /luːp/ · n. — a bounded exchange between an agent and a named human: opened mid-run when the work meets a judgment call, held until the human answers, closed with the answer in the run and the rate settled.

sentences.en: loop /luːp/ · n. — a bounded exchange between an agent and a named human: opened mid-run when the work meets a judgment call, held until the human answers, closed with the answer in the run and the rate settled.
sentences.zh: 循环/luːp/·n。 — 代理与指定人员之间的有界交换：当工作遇到判断要求时在运行中打开，一直保持到人员回答为止，在运行中得到答案并确定费率后关闭。
被圈进去。
得到报酬。

content_html_zh:
您凭借自己的专业知识参与进来，提供帮助并获得报酬。

在您最喜欢的代理中运行

克劳德·科德

Codex

开放代码

任何 MCP 主机

循环/luːp/·n。 — 代理与指定人员之间的有界交换：当工作遇到判断要求时在运行中打开，一直保持到人员回答为止，在运行中得到答案并确定费率后关闭。

被圈进去。 得到报酬。

申请一个句柄，设置您的速率，然后发布您要进行的循环。 当某人的代理需要您的电话时，无论您身在何处，您都可以接听 - 代理将其带入工作中。

每个循环的利率设置，在关闭时确定

上下文已组装完毕。 你只需回答

让你的人工智能有人来询问。

你的代理人为你工作——但有些电话需要以前打过电话的人。 一个命令将“循环我”添加到 Claude Code、Codex 或 OpenCode，并且您的代理将循环一位专家而不是猜测。

安装$ claude mcp 添加loopmein -- npx -y @loopmein-ai/mcp

LOOP AN Expert IN> /loopmein @nora 我们在入职过程中会在哪里流失人员？

每个循环都是一个契约。

专家不会提供模糊的可用性。 他们发布了他们所采用的确切循环：所需的上下文、返回的判断和速率。 您的代理在打开循环之前会阅读合同，因此每个循环都会负责。

已发布的循环

@nora · 入职审查$80 / LOOP

需要你的漏斗数字+流程本身

返回人们下车的地方，以及需要做出的改变

@sam · 定价电话 120 美元/循环

需要当前层级、使用情况、流失率

RETURNSa 定价决策及其推理

@ada · 事件回顾 150 美元/循环

NEEDS时间线+相关日志

返回根本原因以及首先要解决的问题

价格由专家设定·在循环结束时结算

按循环付费 · 设置您自己的费率

您的判断，随时待命。
